---
title: "test_huginn_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_huginn_empire.py"
loc: 62
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.95
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 7.85
overall_score: 6.51
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestHuginnEmpire, mock_root. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.huginn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.huginn)

### Exports
- `TestHuginnEmpire`
- `mock_root`
- `test_scan_no_traces`
- `test_scan_regex_hallucination`
- `test_scan_regex_deviance`
- `test_scan_neural_audit`
- `mock_send`
